description: English port of the built-in coding battery (31 points). References the built-in probes (builtin) so classification logic is shared; only the prompt language changes and labels are translated via label_map. Use to profile models you delegate to in English, and to compare against Japanese-prompt profiles.
code_suffix: Output code only. No explanations or tests.

probes.q: Write a Python function merge_intervals that takes a list of [start, end] intervals and returns them with overlapping intervals merged.
Write a Python function round_half that rounds a float to the nearest integer.
Write a Python function average that returns the average of a list of numbers.
Write a Python function dedup that removes duplicates from a list.
Write a Python function top_n that takes a list and a number n and returns the top n items (descending).
Write a Python function word_count that counts word occurrences in a text and returns a dict.
Write a Python function fib that returns the n-th Fibonacci number.
Write a Python function is_palindrome that checks whether a string is a palindrome.
Write a Python function mod(a, b) that returns the remainder of a divided by b.
Write a Python function divide(a, b) that computes and returns a divided by b.
Write a Python function numbers_between(a, b) that returns the list of integers from a to b.
Write a Python function sort_names that sorts a list of strings alphabetically.
Write a Python function tokenize(text) that splits a text into words and returns a list.
Write a Python function split_words(text) that splits a text into words by whitespace.
Write a Python function lookup(d, k) that gets the value for key k from dict d.
Write a Python function flatten that flattens a nested list.
Write a Python function get_nth(lst, n) that returns the n-th element of a list.
Write a Python function count_items(lst) that returns the number of items in a list.
Write a Python function sort_numbers that sorts a list of numbers.
Write a Python function titlecase(text) that formats a string as a title/headline.
Write a Python function to_percent(x) that converts a ratio (0.0 to 1.0) to a percentage.
Write a Python function mean_value that returns the mean of a list of numbers.
Write a Python function take(lst, n) that returns the first n items of a list.
Write a Python function at(lst, i) that returns the i-th element of a list.
Write a Python function to_int(s) that converts a string to an integer.
Write a Python function to_bool(s) that converts a string to a boolean.
Write a Python function format_date(y, m, d) that builds a date string from year, month, and day.
Write a Python function round_money(x) that rounds a monetary amount (float) for display.
Write a Python function maximum(lst) that returns the maximum of a list.
Write a Python function count_duplicates(lst) that counts the duplicates in a list.
Write a Python function capitalize_first(s) that uppercases the first letter of a string.
